summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AgentFlow after MongoDB to Supabase migration. All 17 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend flow working: Login → Onboarding → Dashboard → Agents Marketplace (22 agents). Dark luxury theme correctly implemented.

minor.issue: Returns 500 when trying to update timezone field - column doesn't exist in Supabase users table
minor.note: ProfileUpdate model has timezone field but Supabase schema lacks it

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add timezone column to Supabase users table OR remove timezone from ProfileUpdate model
critical_code_review_comments: Tenant slug uniqueness constraint can cause 500 errors - consider adding random suffix to slug or better error handling
ProfileUpdate model has timezone field but Supabase users table doesn't have this column - sync schema with model
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users and tenants created during testing with unique timestamps
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Supabase migration features working. Backend uses supabase-py client for all CRUD ops. Marketplace now has 22 agents (expanded from original 5). Free plan enforces 1 agent limit. Test user has tenant already created.

frontend_tests.landing_page: PASSED - Dark luxury theme, hero section, channel badges, CTA buttons
frontend_tests.login_page: PASSED - Email/password inputs, Sign In button, toggle to signup
frontend_tests.onboarding: PASSED - Language selection (6 options), Continue button redirects to dashboard
frontend_tests.dashboard: PASSED - Welcome greeting, 4 stat cards, Quick Actions, Active Agents section, Plan status (Free 0/50)
frontend_tests.agents_marketplace: PASSED - Shows 22 agents, filter buttons, search, Deploy Agent buttons
frontend_tests.bottom_navigation: PASSED - Chat, Agents, CRM, Analytics, Settings tabs

verified_features: User signup creates user in Supabase (returns JWT token)
GET /api/auth/me returns user profile with id, email, full_name, created_at
POST /api/tenants creates tenant with free plan
GET /api/dashboard/stats returns stats with plan info
Frontend login flow works with test@agentflow.com/password123
Frontend redirects to onboarding for new user
Frontend dashboard loads after onboarding with correct user greeting
Marketplace page shows 22 agents with filter and search
